mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MES_AI_RAG_DOCUMENT ( original_file_name, stored_file_name, stored_file_path, content_type, document_category, document_type, tags, status, chunk_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{storedFilePath}, #{contentType}, #{documentCategory}, #{documentType}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{chunkCount}, #{errorMessage}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT document_id AS documentId, original_file_name AS originalFileName, stored_file_name AS storedFileName, stored_file_path AS storedFilePath, content_type AS contentType, document_category AS documentCategory, document_type AS documentType, tags AS tags, status AS status, chunk_count AS chunkCount, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM MES_AI_RAG_DOCUMENT WHERE status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY created_at DESC, document_id DESC

SELECT document_id AS documentId, original_file_name AS originalFileName, stored_file_name AS storedFileName, stored_file_path AS storedFilePath, content_type AS contentType, document_category AS documentCategory, document_type AS documentType, tags AS tags, status AS status, chunk_count AS chunkCount, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM MES_AI_RAG_DOCUMENT WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MES_AI_RAG_DOCUMENT SET status = #{status}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
